module_info.docstring:
Tests for the Git repository LRU cache (file handle management).

These tests verify the _LRURepoCache class behavior to prevent EMFILE errors
under heavy load. Addresses GitHub issue #59.

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-jto (Bug: File handle exhaustion)

methods.name: test_cache_default_maxsize_is_16
methods.docstring: Default maxsize should be 16 (increased from 8 for better concurrency).

methods.name: test_cache_custom_maxsize
methods.docstring: Custom maxsize should be respected.

methods.name: test_cache_minimum_maxsize_is_1
methods.docstring: Maxsize should be at least 1.

methods.name: test_put_and_get
methods.docstring: Basic put and get operations should work.

methods.name: test_peek_does_not_update_lru_order
methods.docstring: Peek should not update LRU order.

methods.name: test_get_updates_lru_order
methods.docstring: Get should update LRU order (move to most recently used).

methods.name: test_contains
methods.docstring: Contains check should work.

methods.name: test_eviction_at_capacity
methods.docstring: Oldest repos should be evicted when at capacity.

methods.name: test_evicted_repos_added_to_evicted_list
methods.docstring: Evicted repos should be tracked for later cleanup with timestamps.

methods.name: test_duplicate_put_updates_lru_order
methods.docstring: Putting same key again should update LRU order without eviction.

classes.name: TestLRURepoCacheCleanup
classes.docstring: Test cleanup behavior for evicted repos.

methods.name: test_cleanup_evicted_returns_count
methods.docstring: _cleanup_evicted should return count of closed repos after grace period.

methods.name: test_cleanup_keeps_recently_evicted_repos
methods.docstring: Repos still within their grace period should not be closed.

methods.name: test_force_cleanup_ignores_grace_period
methods.docstring: force=True should close repos regardless of grace period.

methods.name: test_clear_closes_all_repos
methods.docstring: Clear should close all cached and evicted repos.

methods.name: test_evicted_count_property
methods.docstring: evicted_count should return number of evicted repos.

methods.name: test_stats_property
methods.docstring: stats should return cache statistics.

classes.name: TestLRURepoCacheOpportunisticCleanup
classes.docstring: Test opportunistic cleanup on get operations.

methods.name: test_cleanup_triggered_every_4th_get
methods.docstring: Cleanup should run every 4th get operation.

methods.name: test_clear_repo_cache_returns_count
methods.docstring: clear_repo_cache should return count of closed repos.

methods.name: test_get_repo_cache_stats_returns_dict
methods.docstring: get_repo_cache_stats should return statistics dict.

classes.name: TestLRURepoCacheWarningLogging
classes.docstring: Test warning logs when evicted list grows large.

methods.name: test_warning_logged_when_evicted_exceeds_maxsize
methods.docstring: Warning should be logged when evicted list exceeds maxsize.
